title: Erratic behaviour of muxed signed ports

features.name: signed ports in multiplexer module
features.description: Code should include a module with multiple signed input ports (signed [23:0]) that are selected via a multiplexer select signal
features.snippet:
module test_mux (
  input signed [23:0] in0,
  input signed [23:0] in1,
  input signed [23:0] in2,
  input signed [23:0] in3,
  input signed [3:0] sel,
  output signed [23:0] out
);

features.name: signed assignment from negative literal
features.description: Code should include a signed signal assigned a negative literal value (-1) and subsequently used in mux selection
